targets.query:
from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_raw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "voltage")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _value: r._value, _field: r.node_id + " (" + r.ip_address + ")" }))

from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_raw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _value: r._value, _field: r.node_id + " (" + r.ip_address + ")" }))

from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_raw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "power")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _value: r._value, _field: r.node_id + " (" + r.ip_address + ")" }))

panels.title: Device Status by Time
panels.description: ON = running, STARTING = warm-up delay, OFF = stopped

targets.query:
from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_raw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "status")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _value: r._value, _field: r.node_id + " (" + r.ip_address + ")" }))

panels.title: Message Delay by Device (ms)
panels.description: Extra transit time vs. best-case packet. Near-zero = ideal. Spikes = congestion or RPL re-routing.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_raw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "delay_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _value: r._value, _field: r.node_id + " (" + r.ip_address + ")" }))

from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_raw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "voltage")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _value: r._value, _field: r.node_id + " (" + r.ip_address + ")" }))

from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_raw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _value: r._value, _field: r.node_id + " (" + r.ip_address + ")" }))

from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: -10s)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_raw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "delay_ms")
  |> group(columns: ["node_id"])
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: now(), _value: r._value, _field: r.node_id }))

panels.title: Producer vs Load vs Surplus (W)
panels.description: producer_w = total solar+wind output, load_w = simulated consumption, surplus_w = producer_w - load_w (positive = charging battery, negative = deficit)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy_balance")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "producer_w")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy_balance")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "load_w")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy_balance")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "surplus_w")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Battery Charge / Discharge (kWh per interval)
panels.description: Positive = charging (surplus), negative = discharging (deficit). Zero = battery node unreachable or no surplus.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy_balance")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "delta_kwh")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: ML Anomaly Events per Device
panels.description: 1 = anomaly detected by TinyML model on sensor. Device shuts down after this event until cloud resets it via CoAP.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_raw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ml_anomaly")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _value: r._value, _field: r.node_id }))

from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy_balance")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "surplus_w")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy_balance")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "producer_w")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_raw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ml_anomaly")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == 1)
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sum(column: "_value")

panels.title: Battery Capacity (latest)
panels.description: Derived from cumulative energy_balance.delta_kwh. Start capacity is 5.0 kWh and max capacity is 10.0 kWh.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy_balance")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "delta_kwh")
  |> sum()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: now(), _value: 5.0 + float(v: r._value), _field: "battery_capacity" }))

panels.title: Battery SoC (fullness)
panels.description: 100% means full capacity. This is derived from the same energy_balance.delta_kwh stream as the capacity stat.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy_balance")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "delta_kwh")
  |> sum()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: now(), _value: ((5.0 + float(v: r._value)) / 10.0) * 100.0, _field: "battery_soc" }))

panels.title: PDR by Device (%)
panels.description: Computed per device over the selected time range. Each row is one node_id.

targets.query:
starts = from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_raw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "seq")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == 0)
  |> group(columns: ["node_id"])
  |> last()
  |> duplicate(column: "_time", as: "start_time")
  |> keep(columns: ["node_id", "start_time"])

data = from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_raw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "seq")
  |> duplicate(column: "_time", as: "sample_time")

join(tables: {data: data, starts: starts}, on: ["node_id"])
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sample_time >= r.start_time)
  |> group(columns: ["node_id"])
  |> reduce(
    fn: (r, accumulator) => ({
      received: accumulator.received + 1.0,
      max_seq: if float(v: r._value) > accumulator.max_seq then float(v: r._value) else accumulator.max_seq
    }),
    identity: {received: 0.0, max_seq: -1.0}
  )
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
    node_id: r.node_id,
    pdr_percent: if r.max_seq < 0.0 then 0.0 else (r.received / (r.max_seq + 1.0)) * 100.0
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["node_id", "pdr_percent"])

panels.title: Messages Received by Device
panels.description: Count of telemetry messages received by each device over the selected time range. Each row is one node_id.

targets.query:
starts = from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_raw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "seq")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == 0)
  |> group(columns: ["node_id"])
  |> last()
  |> duplicate(column: "_time", as: "start_time")
  |> keep(columns: ["node_id", "start_time"])

data = from(bucket: "iot_des")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_raw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "seq")
  |> duplicate(column: "_time", as: "sample_time")

join(tables: {data: data, starts: starts}, on: ["node_id"])
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sample_time >= r.start_time)
  |> group(columns: ["node_id"])
  |> count(column: "_value")
  |> rename(columns: { _value: "messages_received" })
  |> keep(columns: ["node_id", "messages_received"])
